sections_cited: section 47 of the Sales Tax Act

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special STRA 958 of 2017 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objections No.1 & 19 2. For hearing of main case. 30.03.2026 Mr. Muhammad Tahir Khalil Dogar, advocate holding brief for Mr. Adil Saeed, advocate for the applicant. Matter is pending since 2017 without any progress. Even notice has not been sought / issued till date. Diary demonstrates that applicant has made no effort to have the matter listed for past six years. Even today counsel seeks time for no cogent reason whatsoever. It appears that applicant is not interested in the present proceedings. Accordingly, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, the reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 47 of the Sales Tax Act, 1990. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
